title: The science of effortlessness: How to activate flow
note: Steven Kotler on the neurochemistry of flow states, the conditions that trigger them, and how to train yourself to enter flow on demand.

title: The bizarre phenomena that medicine struggles to explain
note: Neuroscientist David Linden on the edge cases of medicine: placebo, idiosyncratic drug responses, and what the weird outliers reveal about how bodies and minds actually work.

title: Quantum physics in 22 minutes
note: A tight explainer from Brian Cox on superposition, entanglement, and why the quantum world stops making intuitive sense the moment you zoom in.

title: The web hasn’t happened yet
note: Config London 2025 talk on how the web is still early, the fidelity gap between native and browser, and where the next leap in UI craft is coming from.

title: The quantum roots of reality
note: Brian Cox on quantum mechanics as the substrate of everything, why reality behaves probabilistically at the smallest scales, and what that means for how we understand matter and time.

title: How To Optimize Hormone Health For Longevity
note: Dr. Hyman on hormone optimization, longevity, and functional medicine.

title: You MUST Do This Before 10am!
note: Dispenza on morning routines, meditation, and rewiring your brain before the day starts.

title: The Yogi Book that Changed his Life
note: Dispenza on the book that shifted his worldview and the results from his 7-day meditation retreats.

title: Becoming Supernatural
note: Dispenza on meditation, rewiring the brain, and becoming supernatural through practice.

title: Win The WAR of ART & Unlock Your Creative Potential
note: Pressfield unpacks the War of Art: resistance, the muse, and doing the work.

title: How to Overcome Inner Resistance
note: The science and philosophy behind creative resistance, and practical tools to beat it.

title: What It Really Takes to Accomplish Your Dreams
note: Steven Pressfield on resistance, turning pro, and what it actually costs to pursue meaningful work.

title: How to Access Your Creativity
note: Rick Rubin on tapping into creativity: listening, noticing, and removing blocks.

title: Protocols to Access Creative Energy and Process
note: Deep dive into creative protocols: environment, focus, and the role of the subconscious in the creative process.

title: Rick Rubin Addresses Criticisms & Opens Up About His Greatest Challenge in Life
note: Rick Rubin on criticism, creative purpose, and the greatest challenge he's faced.

title: The Path To Power: Ambition, Status, Strength & Respect - Robert Greene
note: Robert Greene on ambition, power dynamics, status, and earning respect.

title: A Process for Finding & Achieving Your Unique Purpose
note: Robert Greene on finding your unique purpose, mastery, and aligning your life's work.

title: Blueprint for Mastering Every Conversation
note: Jay Shetty on communicating with confidence, mastering conversations, and building genuine connection.

title: Unlearn Negative Thoughts & Behaviors Patterns
note: Dr. Alok Kanojia (Healthy Gamer) on unlearning negative thought patterns, behavioral loops, and mental reframing.

title: Inventing on Principle
note: Bret Victor's legendary talk on how creators need a guiding principle, and how immediate feedback transforms the way we build and think.

title: How to Control Your Inner Voice & Increase Your Resilience
note: Dr. Ethan Kross on quieting the inner critic, reframing self-talk, and building psychological resilience.

title: Using Your Mind to Control Your Physical Health & Longevity
note: Dr. Ellen Langer on how mindset directly shapes physical health, aging, and longevity.
